title: [YTP] cs188's mASSive Remonetized Remix Collab
description:
Welcome to the movie where everyone takes a giant poop on my face.  (Also ironically, this video is absolutely NOT monetized)

Source #1 (appeal video): https://youtube.com/watch?v=FpPS2e5iKpc
Source #2 (collab announcement): https://youtube.com/watch?v=siWz2FUrMq8

Chapters:
0:00 - Preface
1:48 - Just believe me, don't watch
2:54 - Hello 👋
3:55 - Who is this person again?
8:56 - Apolog-EYES-ing
11:29 - It's 4/20 already
12:32 - Random Insanity 1: Change of Appearance
13:36 - We're going to HELL 🔥
14:47 - Random Insanity 2: CS is Evolving
15:58 - Owner of (everything)...
18:50 - I've been a creator...
20:37 - Random Insanity 3: Guidelines and Not Following Them
25:40 - Policies and policies and policies
28:12 - The Help (Me) Section
34:32 - Random Insanity 4: CS starts to give up on things
35:42 - Rearranging magazines or whatever
37:22 - HoH SiS and more bad things starting with the letter "H"
39:25 - "Creative Process" / self-editing time
44:23 - THE BIG CRASH
45:36 - Random Insanity 5: Downward Spiral
46:57 - A-POOP-CALYPSE NOW!! 💩
51:24 - "I've opened up a project file" / the BIG editing segment
59:11 - Let's get MUSICAL
1:01:12 - Random Insanity 6: COMPLETE INSANITY
1:02:44 - Transformations
1:08:09 - Roll the credits, please!
